channel.title: Konstantinos Zoropoulos | MEng Candidate
channel.description: Recent content on Konstantinos Zoropoulos | MEng Candidate

item.title: mmWave Fall Detection System
item.description: A commercial-grade fall detection system for the elderly using mmWave sensors, PIR, Zigbee, and ESP32 microcontrollers.

item.title: Data Analysis App
item.description: Analytical overview, technical specifications, and description for the educational data aggregation and recommendation project.

item.title: mySQLq Lexical and Syntax Analyzer
item.description: Analytical overview, technical specifications, and description for the custom SQL lexer and parser project.

item.title: Low-Profile Embedded Calculator
item.description: Design and implementation of a fully functional, battery-powered embedded calculator built on the Waveshare RP2040 Plus platform.

item.title: About me
item.description:
Hello, I’m Kostas! I am an undergraduate Computer Engineering & Informatics (CEID) student at the University of Patras.

You can reach me directly via the following contact details:

  • Email: kostaszoropoulos@gmail.com
  • Phone: +30 6988633078

item.title: Academic Profile
item.description: Overview of academic background, coursework, and supplementary training.
